summary: This is a brief announcement post for FogBUGZ 2.03, a bug-fix release from Fog Creek Software. Joel notes that all known bugs have been fixed in this release. He directs customers who didn't receive upgrade notifications to contact him. The post primarily serves to promote his longer article 'Hard-assed Bug Fixin'' which details their bug-fixing process.
key_points: FogBUGZ 2.03 is a strictly bug-fix release with all known bugs resolved
Fog Creek proactively notified customers by email about the upgrade
The post links to a longer article detailing their rigorous bug-fixing methodology
money_quotes: This is strictly a bug-fix release in which we have fixed all known bugs.
key_insight: A short product announcement emphasizing Fog Creek's commitment to shipping bug-free software and their transparency about the bug-fixing process.
